title: verbascum betonicifolium
intro: Verbascum betonicifolium, also known as Long-leaved Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. Verbascum betonicifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
